decisions.text: Implement system-generated financial controls and accurate bookkeeping categorization to replace manual P&L creation and restore financial accountability within 90 days.
Restructure bookkeeper and director roles with clear job descriptions, performance expectations, and compensation aligned with deliverables and organizational sustainability.
Establish clear governance framework defining decision authority between abbot, director, finance committee, and planning committee with documented policies.
Develop explicit operational models for residential programs and revenue streams with measurable outcomes and accountability mechanisms.

actionItems.text: Hire experienced bookkeeper/accountant (Veronique) to professionalize financial operations and implement QuickBooks properly with accurate categorization protocols.
Conduct strategic planning retreat with key stakeholders to align leadership on 3-5 year vision, annual goals, and budgets connected to 50-year strategic vision.
Create written HR policies covering hiring, termination, compensation review, and performance management; formalize job descriptions with clear performance expectations.
Implement performance improvement plan (PIP) for current bookkeeper with documented expectations, timeline, and clear performance metrics; establish accountability structure.
Build financial literacy training program for leadership and board members to improve understanding of financial management, budgeting, and accountability.

commitments.text: Restore financial accountability and implement system-generated financial controls with accurate categorization within 90 days.
Establish clear governance structure defining decision authority and reinvigorate committee structures to ensure leadership alignment on financial constraints.

risks.text: Loss of key personnel (Danielle considering leaving due to pay/workload issues) could severely impact operations and institutional knowledge if succession planning not established.
risks.mitigation: Develop director role with realistic compensation, support, and delegation; establish succession pipeline through deliberate mentoring.

risks.text: Financial mismanagement could jeopardize nonprofit status, donor trust, and ability to fundraise due to inaccurate bookkeeping and lack of system-generated controls.
risks.mitigation: Implement professional bookkeeping function, accurate categorization protocols, system-generated reporting, and finance committee oversight within 90 days.

risks.text: Governance gaps and absence of formal policies create legal/compliance exposure and enable poor performers to remain without accountability mechanisms.
risks.mitigation: Establish written HR/finance policies, document hiring/termination procedures, clarify decision authority, and create performance review cycles.

risks.text: Continued operational dysfunction could result in declining practice participation and inability to attract/retain quality staff due to low compensation and unclear roles.
risks.mitigation: Bridge mission and operations by demonstrating that operational excellence serves contemplative mission; realign staffing with market rates and clear expectations.

decisions.text: Defer real-time collaboration features to Q2 2026 due to bandwidth constraints, prioritizing PostgreSQL migration and Next.js upgrade in Q1
Proceed with PostgreSQL migration in Q1 2026 as critical infrastructure modernization initiative required for scalability
Execute Next.js 16 upgrade with 2-week timeline to reduce build pipeline bottlenecks and improve developer productivity
Implement phased sequencing of three concurrent initiatives (PostgreSQL migration, Next.js upgrade, dashboard features) instead of parallel execution
Escalate capacity constraints and financial modeling requirements to executive leadership before finalizing Q1 execution plan

actionItems.text: Develop comprehensive PostgreSQL migration risk mitigation plan including rollback procedures, testing protocols, and zero-downtime migration strategies
Establish formal capacity planning framework quantifying available engineering hours and allocating resources across Q1 initiatives with trade-off decisions
Create and document detailed PostgreSQL migration rollback plan with pre-migration data snapshots and clear decision points for pause/rollback
Implement weekly sales-product sync with structured feedback loop to identify emerging client needs and monitor deal pipeline impacts from feature deferrals
Quantify PostgreSQL migration costs across infrastructure, testing, and potential downtime to resolve budget uncertainty and inform executive decisions
Define clear backward compatibility gates and testing protocols for Next.js 16 upgrade ensuring zero UI breaking changes

commitments.text: Charlie commits to ensuring zero UI breaking changes during Next.js 16 upgrade and component compatibility across all existing systems
Bob commits to completing comprehensive testing and rollback plan documentation before PostgreSQL migration execution by March 22 deadline
Diana commits to managing downtime planning and client communication strategy for PostgreSQL migration with explicit service availability safeguards

risks.text: Aggressive timeline compression with three concurrent major initiatives (Next.js upgrade, PostgreSQL migration, architecture redesign) sharing overlapping March deadlines against explicitly acknowledged insufficient bandwidth, risking quality degradation, team burnout, and delivery failure
risks.mitigation: Implement phased initiative sequencing with clear dependency mapping to reduce concurrent execution and allocate Bob's bandwidth strategically across sequential phases with contingency buffers

risks.text: Data loss potential during PostgreSQL migration without robust rollback plan, comprehensive testing protocols, and clear downtime strategy, threatening user experience and revenue
risks.mitigation: Develop comprehensive migration risk mitigation plan including pre-migration data snapshots, blue-green deployments or read replicas, production-like environment testing, explicit monitoring/alerting, and documented rollback procedures

risks.text: Client churn risk from deferring real-time collaboration features to Q2 as competitors may offer these capabilities, potentially causing deal losses with quantifiable but currently unquantified revenue impact
risks.mitigation: Implement proactive client communication strategy positioning Q1 technical investments as strategic quality enhancements, create account-specific messaging for affected clients, and establish weekly sales-product sync for early identification of at-risk accounts

risks.text: Backward compatibility issues with existing components during Next.js 16 upgrade causing regressions and component incompatibility despite Charlie's zero breaking changes commitment
risks.mitigation: Define clear backward compatibility gates, establish component regression testing suite, create explicit approval criteria for component changes, and document which components upgrade versus remain on previous version

risks.text: Single point of technical execution bottleneck with Bob's limited bandwidth required across Next.js upgrade, PostgreSQL migration, and architecture design, limiting parallelization and increasing dependency risk
risks.mitigation: Create comprehensive documentation and knowledge transfer program to distribute technical ownership beyond Bob and establish runbooks for future deployments enabling team scaling and reduced individual contributor dependency
